Add PKCE support and update API to match C3 spec

- PKCE (S256) code_challenge/code_verifier for Volvo OAuth flow

- Remove non-existent endpoints (location, battery-charge-level, electric-range)
- Add statistics endpoint (distanceToEmpty, averageSpeed, avgFuelConsumption)

- Better error handling in OAuth callback (redirect with error message)

Increase auth timeout to 20s to handle Supabase cold starts

Free-tier Supabase projects pause after inactivity. The previous 8s timeout
was too short for cold starts, causing auth to fail with timeout errors
even though Supabase eventually responds.

may limit results. Now uses ALL to match Meta Ad Library UI behavior.
Added logging for why pagination stops to diagnose missing ads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add The Birth of Structure: Feigenbaum architecture in the quantum-to-classical transition

Scripts 73-80: Lindblad eigenvalue sweep, coherence dynamics, Duffing/Rössler/Kerr
cascades, Feigenbaum δ extraction, five-system topology sweep, quantum Kerr cascade
(QuTiP mesolve), and the quantum vs classical parametric drive comparison.

Key result: classical system shows full Feigenbaum cascade (δ₂ = 5.09, converging
to 4.669), quantum density matrix shows Period-1 everywhere — decoherence is the
birth of the cascade, not its enemy. 8 scripts, 24 figures, .docx generator.

DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18901590

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remove purpose Transfer; overhaul rebalance modal with +/− per-purpose grid

UI:
- Removed Transfer button from purpose rows
- Rebalance modal now loads all purposes immediately on open (single fetch)
- Each purpose row shows current-in-account balance + [+] (green) / [−] (red)
  toggle buttons and an amount input; rows highlight green/red when active
- New-total input updates delta synchronously (no extra fetch on each keystroke)
- 'Remaining to commit' counts signed net toward delta; Confirm enabled at 0
- Works with delta = 0 (pure redistribution within account, no total change)

Logic:
- executeAccountRebalance now takes signed portions (+ grow, − shrink);
  delta parameter removed — each portion carries its own direction
- POST /api/accounts/:id/rebalance validates sum(portions) === delta;
  allows empty transfers array; allows delta = 0
- GET /api/accounts/:id/rebalance-candidates always returns all purposes

commit.message:
fix: SSE progress events crash during crawling stage

Iterating `for p in pages` iterated over dict keys (strings) instead
of values (PageData), causing AttributeError on p.internal_links.
Since progress_callback runs as fire-and-forget task, the exception
was silently swallowed — zero events sent during crawling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update TOS and Privacy Policy for March 2026 features

Added coverage for: wholesale AP module, credit memos (manual + auto),
AI chat (ShelfiQ), affiliate rep program, multi-location support,
promotions, recurring payments, MFA requirements, CSV uploads,
purchase orders, data accuracy responsibilities. Updated Privacy Policy
with: EIN/tax/banking/signature/W-9 data collection, audit logging,
MFA data, and third-party service providers (Supabase, Vercel, Resend,
Sentry, Anthropic). Bumped effective date to March 7, 2026.

commit.message:
Add per-call timeout to all Ollama generate requests

A stuck Ollama inference call would block the daemon cycle indefinitely,
as the daemon context has no timeout. This was observed in production:
the fetcher hung for 7+ hours with Ollama pegged at 100% CPU.

Adds callTimeout to AIProcessor (default 2 minutes, configurable via
ollama.timeout in config.yaml) and applies context.WithTimeout at every
client.Generate call across ollama.go, summarization.go, and clustering.go.

commit.message:
Fix ProfileView edit modal hidden behind navigation bar

Navigation renders after <main> in DOM order and both had z-50, so the
nav bar sat on top of the modal, cutting off the Interests field and
Save button on small screens.

Fix: raise edit modal overlay to z-[200] so it always sits above the
navigation bar. Also tighten maxHeight to min(100dvh, 100svh) - 1/2rem
so the sheet shrinks correctly when the virtual keyboard is open on
Android/iOS and the full form remains reachable.

fix: remove installerLanguages + simplify workflow (no electron-rebuild step)

package.json:
- Remove installerLanguages: ["es_AR"] — es_AR not a valid NSIS language pack
  bundled with electron-builder, causes silent build failure

build-windows.yml:
- Remove separate electron-rebuild step (electron-builder handles native
  module rebuild automatically via npmRebuild: true default)
- Use npm ci --ignore-scripts to skip macOS-specific postinstall
- electron-builder --win compiles better-sqlite3 for Windows/Electron internally

fix(installer): handle Redis 'static unit' on Debian Trixie/RPi

+ direct redis-server daemon fallback before dying.

commit.message:
feat: reorganize security view to match traffic flow

A) Firewall (consolidated + A.1 VPS, A.2 OS iptables, A.3 Docker bindings)
B) Web Server — Caddy (TLS, headers)
C) Auth — Authelia (ACL rules)
D) Rev Proxy — Caddy (domain→upstream routing)
E) VPN — WireGuard (hub-spoke mesh)
F) Container — Docker (network isolation)
G) Secrets — sops/age (encrypted credentials status)

Each section has its own color. Follows actual traffic flow order.

commit.message:
Fix blank PDF: use on-screen container with opacity:0 for html2canvas

The off-screen container (left: -9999px) and string mode both failed
because html2canvas cannot render elements outside the viewport.
This approach keeps the container at position 0,0 with opacity:0 so
html2canvas can capture it while remaining invisible to the user.

fix: Guard against undefined threadData.messages in ThreadPanel (#1875)

Add defensive checks for $threadData.messages being undefined during
Svelte 5 reactive transitions. The derived mergedTimeline computation
and two template reply-count displays accessed .length without guarding
against messages being undefined, causing "Cannot read properties of
undefined (reading 'length')" crashes during rapid thread open/close.

commit.message:
fix: 周报内容过少 — 补抓取步骤 + 调整去重阈值

weekly_report.yml:
- 新增 step 3: python monitor.py run --period week --no-translate
  作为补充抓取，覆盖三类失效场景：
  1) 手动触发（daily_check 未在当日运行，如周末）
  2) 竞态条件（daily_check 仍在运行时 weekly_report 已启动）
  3) daily_check continue-on-error 静默失败
- 新增 step 4: python monitor.py retranslate --limit 60
  翻译步骤与抓取分离，避免 LLM rate limit 超时导致整体失败
- bulk_upsert 幂等设计，重复运行不产生重复条目

reporter.py:
- _dedup_for_display LLM 验证触发阈值 0.25 → 0.35
  减少将不同报道误判为"同一事件"并合并的情况，
  避免本就稀少的周报条目被进一步压缩

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: skip display_map dropout recovery when returning to dock

The keepalive's display_map dropout detector fires a full wake burst
(notify_app_event + get_device_base_status) when no display_map arrives
for 30s during CLEANING state. During return-to-dock, display_map stops
but working_status stays CLEANING — so the burst fires every 45s,
interrupting the return and causing the robot to pause repeatedly.

Now checks is_returning before triggering dropout recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add R language support for worker-graded submissions (#79)

* Auto-start SSO from login page in SSO mode

* Add R language support for worker-graded submissions (issue #77)

Wires .r files through every layer of the stack so instructors can write
R test scripts and students can submit .R source files:

- ScriptInvocation: add .r extension → Rscript invocation
- RunnerDaemon: embed and inject test_runtime.R alongside test_runtime.py;
  provides passed(), failed(), errored() helpers with no external dependencies
- AssignmentRoutes: add "r" to supportedExtensions (auto-classify .r as test
  scripts) and contentType (serve as plain text)
- submit.leaf: add .r to file input accept attribute
- assignment-new.leaf / assignment-edit.leaf: add .r to isLikelyScript()

WebR/JupyterLite notebook support is deferred to a follow-on.

commit.message:
Fix: AI function calling - Single create_incident_report with explicit params

Root cause: The 2-step flow (suggest → confirm → create) was too complex.
The model said "apro la segnalazione" but never called the function.

Changes:
- Merged suggest_incident_report + create_incident_report into ONE function
- create_incident_report now receives ALL data as explicit parameters:
  title, description, category, severity, sezione_numero, is_verbalizzato
- No more extraction from conversation via Vertex AI (was fragile)
- The AI gathers info conversationally, shows summary, asks confirmation
- On confirmation, AI calls create_incident_report with structured data
- Function resolves sezione from number, validates category/severity
- Simplified system prompt: clearer 4-step flow instead of 8-step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: v3.7.0 "Context Fortress" — Engram persistent memory, Orchestrator Isolation, GGA cached validation

Three pillars of Strict Context Optimization:

1. Engram (FTS5 persistent memory):
   - CLAUDE.md.template: mandatory check, OS-specific binary install, Surviving Compaction protocol
   - on-session-end.sh: persists session summary via `engram save`
   - .vscode/mcp.json: registers Engram MCP server with --tools=agent

2. Strict Orchestrator Isolation:
   - implement.md + SKILL.md: Phase Task Template, delegation protocol, ~8,700 token budget per phase
   - GLOBAL_RULES.md: Orchestrator Isolation section with 15% token budget rules
   - team-config.json.template: orchestrator node (canImplement:false, canWriteCode:false)

3. GGA (Gentleman Guardian Angel) cached lint:
   - .gga config: PROVIDER=claude, STRICT_MODE=true
   - pre-commit-lint.sh: tries `gga run` first, falls back to direct lint
   - install.sh: installs GGA via `brew install gentleman-programming/tap/gga`

Fixes: mem_store→mem_save, engram CLI commands, pip→binary install URLs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 7: Event pressure, zone dynamics, substrate resonances, and full documentation audit

This commit implements three major game systems (13 migrations, 068-080),
their corresponding backend/frontend code, and a comprehensive documentation
audit that updates every stale reference across the project.

=== DATABASE (13 migrations, 068-080) ===

Event Pressure & Lifecycle (068-071):
- Graduated event pressure: POWER(impact_level/10, 1.5) formula with
  status multipliers (escalating 1.3x, resolving 0.5x)
- Event lifecycle state machine: active → escalating → resolving →
  resolved → archived, with event_chains table (escalation, follow_up,
  resolution, cascade, resonance chain types)
- Reaction modifier pressure: emotion-weighted reaction contributions
  to zone pressure via trigger-based aggregation
- Reaction modifier trigger: auto-recalculates zone pressure on
  reaction insert/update/delete

Zone Gravity & Dynamics (072-073):
- Zone gravity matrix: event-type → zone-type affinity scoring with
  auto-assignment trigger assign_event_zones() and _global flag
- Zone vulnerability matrix: zone-type × event-type multipliers
  (0.5x-1.5x), per-simulation configurable via simulation_settings
- Zone actions: fortify (+0.3, 7d/14d cooldown), quarantine (-0.1 +
  cascade-block, 14d/21d), deploy_resources (+0.5, 3d/30d)
- Cascade events function: process_cascade_events() generates follow-up
  events when zone pressure > 0.7, rate-limited, quarantine-immune

Substrate Resonances (074-080):
- Core schema: substrate_resonances + resonance_impacts tables, enums,
  triggers, RLS (public read, authenticated write, admin full access)
- Seed data: resonance profiles + event type maps for 5 simulations
- Derivation functions: fn_derive_resonance_fields() maps source_category
  → signature + archetype + event_types via trigger
- Utility functions: fn_get_resonance_susceptibility(),
  fn_get_resonance_event_types()
- Admin RLS: is_platform_admin() SECURITY DEFINER, admin full access policy
- Gameplay functions: fn_resonance_operative_modifier() (archetype-operative
  affinities), fn_target_zone_pressure() (zone pressure bonus)
- Seed gameplay settings: operative pressure/modifier caps, bot awareness
- Balance fixes (080): fn_target_zone_pressure NULL bug fix (returned cap
  instead of 0.0 when zone_id not found), caps reduced 0.06→0.04,
  fn_resonance_operative_modifier adds infiltrator oppositions (The Entropy,
  The Devouring Mother) + subsiding 0.5x decay + clamp [-0.04, +0.04],
  NEW fn_attacker_pressure_penalty() [-0.04, 0.00], active_resonances view
  excludes archived status

=== BACKEND ===

New services:
- ResonanceService: full CRUD + impact processing pipeline (AI event
  generation with archetype-driven prompts, fallback templates, status
  transitions, batch impact processing across simulations)
- ZoneActionService: player interventions with cooldown validation,
  duration calculation, zone stability effects
- PlatformApiKeysService: admin management of 6 platform API keys
  (OpenRouter, Replicate, Guardian, NewsAPI, Tavily, DeepL) with
  5-min cache TTL and invalidation

Modified services:
- OperativeService: success probability formula expanded from 5 to 8 terms
  (added resonance_zone_pressure +0.00 to +0.04, resonance_operative_modifier
  -0.04 to +0.04, attacker_pressure_penalty -0.04 to 0.00)
- BotGameState: tracks active_resonances, resonance_aligned_types,
  resonance_opposed_types; is_under_resonance_pressure(),
  get_resonance_preferred_operative()
- BotPersonality: Sentinel increases guardian deployment 50%→60% under
  resonance pressure; Strategist applies resonance preference
- EventService: event lifecycle transitions, pressure calculation,
  cascade event triggering
- GenerationService: resonance_impact_generation prompt template
- ForgeOrchestratorService: updated for new Pydantic models
- ExternalServiceResolver: Tavily integration for Forge Astrolabe

New routers:
- /api/v1/resonances: 8 endpoints (list, get, create, update, process-impact,
  list-impacts, update-status, restore, delete)
- /api/v1/zone-actions: 3 endpoints (list, execute, cancel)
- Extended events router with lifecycle + seismograph data endpoints
- Extended public router with resonance read endpoints

New models:
- Resonance Pydantic models (create, update, response, impact)
- ZoneAction models (create, response)
- Extended Event models (lifecycle status, chains, pressure)

Tests:
- 347 new bot personality unit tests covering resonance awareness,
  pressure-based decision modification, operative preference under
  active resonances

=== FRONTEND ===

New components:
- ResonanceMonitor: platform-level dashboard with status/signature filters,
  auto-refresh 60s, magnitude color coding (cyan/amber/red)
- ResonanceCard: individual resonance display with magnitude indicator,
  status badge, countdown timer, expandable bureau dispatch
- AdminResonancesTab: full admin panel (Active/Archived/Trash views,
  CRUD, status transitions, impact processing, soft-delete/restore)
- AdminResonanceFormModal: create/edit form with source category
  auto-derivation preview, magnitude slider, datetime picker
- AdminApiKeysTab: admin panel for 6 platform API keys with masked
  display, save/clear per key
- EventSeismograph: SVG seismograph visualization (30/90/180/365 days)
  with spike colors by impact, pressure overlay, brush selection,
  resonance/cascade markers
- VelgFontPicker: shared component with 13 curated fonts for Forge
  Darkroom theme customization

Modified components:
- EventCard: lifecycle status indicators, pressure badge, chain markers
- EventDetailsPanel: expanded with lifecycle controls, chain visualization,
  reaction modifier display (~800 lines added)
- EventEditModal: lifecycle status field
- EventsView: seismograph integration, pressure filter
- SimulationsDashboard: ResonanceMonitor integration
- SimulationHealthView: zone pressure visualization, zone action controls
  (~400 lines added)
- ZoneList: zone actions (fortify/quarantine/deploy), cooldown display
- AdminPanel: resonances + API keys tabs
- SocialTrendsView: major expansion (~700 lines)
- TransformationModal: expanded transformation pipeline
- Toast: enhanced notification system
- VelgForgeDarkroom: font picker integration
- VelgForgeTable: updated draft management

New API services:
- ResonanceApiService: singleton for all resonance endpoints
- ZoneActionApiService: singleton for zone action endpoints

i18n:
